module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent engine module, frontdoor session/task endpoints, public model request interface, Deepseek backend implementation, and future retrieval/tool interfaces.

childModules.name: engine
childModules.purpose: Agent engine module reserved for orchestration implementation.

childModules.name: frontdoor
childModules.purpose: Agent frontdoor session and task endpoint drafts for accepting one client session and multiple user-message tasks.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Public model request interface, crate-internal backend implementation boundary, model error definitions, and streaming Deepseek backend implementation.
